comment: Runtime Card NFT registry. The 95 rarest Card NFT 2 pieces (see content/card-nfts-top95.json for the ranked snapshot + mints). Images intaken 2026-07-03 at 160x224 (+60x84 thumbs). Captions are v1 placeholders pending the personality pass.
